conversation.content: Hello. Welcome to AutoStream. How can I assist you with our video editing tools today?

The Pro plan is $79/month and includes unlimited videos, 4K resolution export, AI-generated captions, advanced transitions and effects, priority 24/7 support, and team collaboration for up to 3 seats. Since you showed interest in the Pro plan earlier, would you like to try our 7-day free trial?
I want to sign up for my YouTube channel
Awesome, let's get you set up! 🎉 What's your name?
Nice to meet you, Nancy! What's your email address?
And which platform do you primarily create for? (e.g. YouTube, Instagram, TikTok)
You're all set, Nancy! 🚀 Our team will reach out shortly to help you get started with AutoStream's Pro plan. Is there anything else I can help you with?
